## PixLab Desktop 0.1.5

This release adds browser-to-desktop pet opening and fixes the Pet Library controls.

### New

- Added `pixlab://` desktop protocol support so pet pages can open pets directly in PixLab Desktop.
- Added single-instance handling for deep links, so browser opens focus the running app instead of launching duplicate windows.

### Improved

- Compact Pet Library action buttons so icon controls no longer render oversized.
- Updated the desktop bundle for the latest Pet Library and gallery behavior.
- Versioned the desktop app as `0.1.5` for update checks and GitHub Releases.

### Downloads

- Windows 64-bit: use the `x64` setup or MSI file.
- Windows 32-bit: use the `x86` setup or MSI file.
- macOS: use the DMG file if available from the release assets.

### Notes

Browser Open buttons require PixLab Desktop 0.1.5 or newer to be installed so the `pixlab://` protocol is registered.
